if.test: type != null and keyword != null and keyword != ''

mapper.select: select b.board_no, b.member_id, m.member_name, b.board_title, b.board_content, b.board_hit, b.created_at, b.updated_at from board b join ess_member m on b.member_id = m.member_id order by b.board_no desc
select b.board_no, b.member_id, m.member_name, b.board_title, b.board_content, b.board_hit, b.created_at, b.updated_at from board b join ess_member m on b.member_id = m.member_id where 1=1
mapper.insert: insert into board(member_id, board_title, board_content) values( #{member_id},#{board_title},#{board_content})
mapper.select: select b.board_no, b.member_id, m.member_name, b.board_title, b.board_content, b.board_hit, b.created_at, b.updated_at from board b join ess_member m on b.member_id = m.member_id where b.board_no = #{board_no}
select count(*) from board b join ess_member m on b.member_id = m.member_id where 1 = 1
